title: STATUS 13A 3‑Pin White Electrical Plug Tops – Pack of 3, BS1363‑Compliant with Cord Grip, CE Certified & Recyclable, Ideal for Home or Office Use, (13APLUG3PK5)
features: PACK OF THREE 13A PLUG TOPS STATUS supplies three UK standard fused 13 A plug tops in one package, perfect for homemakers or tradespeople stocking up on essential electrical accessories.
CE CERTIFIED FOR UK STANDARD SAFETY Each plug meets British safety requirements and carries CE certification, ensuring compliance with domestic usage regulations
CORD GRIP FOR SECURE WIRING Featuring built-in cord grips that clamp cable firmly, each plug enhances installation safety and prevents strain damage.
DURABLE, ECO‑CONSCIOUS MATERIALS Constructed using long-lasting white polycarbonate and designed with retire-friendly recyclable materials for sustainability.
BLISTER PACK PACKAGING FOR PROTECTION Supplied in practical blister-card packaging to protect during transport, storage, or display — ideal for retail counters.
description: From the manufacturer About Status International With people and innovation right at the heart of our business, Status International (UK) Limited, ("Status"), has earned its position as the UK’s one of the leading independent supplier of lighting and electrical accessories. Status is run by father and son, Peter and Nicholas McVeigh, who between them have over 80 years combined experience in the lighting industry. Today, Status boasts a customer base across the UK and Europe including major national retailers, wholesalers, independent retailers and electrical wholesalers. In 2016, Status celebrated its 25th anniversary. Status is located at its head office in Cleckheaton, West Yorkshire, with a warehouse, distribution centre, in house design studio and laboratory.
